mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_comment_report (qna_comment_id, member_id, qna_comment_report_reason, qna_comment_report_status, qna_comment_report_created_at, qna_comment_report_content) VALUES (#{qnaCommentId}, #{memberId}, #{qnaCommentReportReason}, 'WAIT', NOW(), #{qnaCommentReportContent})
mapper.select: SELECT cr.qna_comment_report_id, cr.qna_comment_id, cr.member_id, cr.qna_comment_report_reason, cr.qna_comment_report_status, cr.qna_comment_report_created_at, cr.qna_comment_report_content, m.member_name, c.qna_comment_content FROM qna_comment_report cr JOIN member m ON cr.member_id = m.member_id JOIN qna_comment c ON cr.qna_comment_id = c.qna_comment_id ORDER BY cr.qna_comment_report_created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE qna_comment_report SET qna_comment_report_status = #{qnaCommentReportStatus} WHERE qna_comment_report_id = #{qnaCommentReportId}
